name: Payment
description: Records a financial transaction received from a Client, usually against an Invoice. IMPORTANT: Payment recording is a restricted administrative action. Bica must ensure the user has 'Finance' or 'Admin' clearance before recording payments. Payments must specify the amount, payment method, and be tied to a Client.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment.

method.description: The mode of payment used (e.g., Transfer, Cash, POS).

reference.description: Payment reference number or transaction ID.

date.description: The date the payment was received.
